rationale: Both evaluations land on essentially the same two disqualifying concerns — basic German below the required C1, and lack of executive leadership/formal team management — plus the same secondary gap around UML/security/compliance. The 1-point score difference (3 vs 4) is within ordinary run-to-run noise, and the reasoning never references Brazil, nationality, or any location at all. No concern, score shift, or rationale keys off the demographic change to location.
